emails.subject: 1/2 Day Meeting in Portland
emails.body: 1/2 Day Meeting in Portland Christian is trying to schedule a half day meeting in Portland to discuss summer legal strategy. The meeting would run from 1:00 pm to approximately 5 or 6 pm. Please advise whether Thursday, April 5, or Friday, April 6, would be best for you. Please respond by email to me. Thank you.

emails.body: Re: 1/2 Day Meeting in Portland thurs the 5th would be best

emails.subject: 1/2 day meeting in Portland
emails.body: 1/2 day meeting in Portland Thank you all for responding so promptly. The meeting has been set for Thursday, April 5, in Portland from 1 PM to approx. 6 PM. Please let me know if I can assist you with any travel plans. I have reserved the Mt. Hood conference room for this meeting.
